title: [codereview-pass2] LR1110.cs security/IRQ
description: Pass 2: DIO9 vs IRQ naming. LR1110 uses 32-bit IRQ flags but current code mixes with SX1262 16-bit logic. ClearIrq and GetIrqStatus need latching like SX1262. No bounds checking on bufferOffset. T1000-E pinout (P1.10 RESET, P0.12 CS, DIO9 on gpio1.1) matches repl but confirm no Busy conflict with other peripherals. codereview tag.
close_reason: LR1110.cs: added 32bit IRQ latching like SX1262.cs (latchedIrqFlags, masks in ClearIrq/GetIrqStatus), improved bufferOffset bounds checks. Mimicked style, no new comments, full Renode test integrity. T1000-E pinout confirmed. P2 bug fixed.
